heading: Thursday Night
text: Mostly to partly cloudy. Scattered showers north, mainly early. Lows from the mid 40s to around 50. Winds diminishing to light and variable, except continuing from the north at  5 to 10 mph in the Champlain and St. Lawrence valleys.

heading: Friday
text: Partly to mostly cloudy. Afternoon showers likely near and north of Route 4, a rising chance late to the south; thunder possible. Highs again in the mid to upper 60s, with some lower 60s far north, and some lower 70s in southern valleys. West to southwest winds 5 to 15 mph, gusting to 25 mph in the St. Lawrence Valley.

heading: Friday Night
text: Mostly cloudy. Showers or early thunderstorms likely south and west of I-89; a steadier rain, possibly heavy at times, to the north and east; snow possible in the mountains above 3,000 feet, with little or no accumulation, except several inches possible over the high summits of the White Mountains. Lows from the upper 30s to mid 40s. Winds becoming northwest 5 to 15 mph, becoming north and gusting to 20 mph in the Champlain Valley.
